name: ssn-implements-inverse-declared
query: PREFIX ssn: <http://www.w3.org/ns/ssn/> ASK WHERE { ssn:implements <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#inverseOf> ssn:implementedBy }

name: ssn-observes-subproperty-of-for-property
query: PREFIX sosa: <http://www.w3.org/ns/sosa/> PREFIX ssn: <http://www.w3.org/ns/ssn/> ASK WHERE { sosa:observes <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#subPropertyOf> ssn:forProperty }
